actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour Fire (m_Script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d; component fileID seen in prefab: 2592690533154406537) on GameObject 'Fire-Wrapper - R - 1 - 3' with BoxCollider and no Rigidbody. Serialized scene settings match the provided script: isOn=false, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, onNeighborsThreshold=2, maxHitInterval=2, totalHitTime=5, neighbors=[], mainEffectGo fileID 1849464941111748095. This Trigger represents selecting/activating the collider so systems that depend on collider interactions (e.g., Water system calling IWaterInteractable.WaterHit) can respond. Expected behaviors depend on external systems: (A) Neighbor ignition path requires external calls to NotifyNeighborState(bool) or FindNeighbors(Fire[], int); (B) Extinguish path requires external water system to call WaterHit(Vector3) repeatedly within maxHitInterval until totalHitTime is reached.

Manual test step to cover the extinguish logic: repeatedly hit the Fire via the water system (which should invoke Fire.WaterHit(Vector3 normal) through IWaterInteractable) with intervals < maxHitInterval (2s) accumulating to > totalHitTime (5s). This should set isTurningOff=true, then after accumulating currentHitTime>=totalHitTime, flip isOn=false and call UpdateFireState(true) which should Stop() all ParticleSystems and notify neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1). Requires an external water sprayer/object to actually invoke WaterHit.

Manual test step to cover ignition-by-neighbors: ensure at least onNeighborsThreshold (2) neighbors report fireOn=true via NotifyNeighborState(true), or call FindNeighbors(Fire[] allFires, int fireId) and have >=2 nearby isOn neighbors. This should set shouldTurnOn=true and after timeToOn (random in [40,60], modified by downMultiplier if any down neighbor is present) flip isOn=true and call UpdateFireState(true) which should Play() ParticleSystems and notify neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1). Requires neighbor Fire objects and an external system to call NotifyNeighborState/FindNeighbors.
